$comment: Layer B selection cases for GRADE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The pass mark is >= 60, so score exactly 60 catches a strict-> off-by-one; a half-cent bonus (score 61 -> 1.525 -> 1.53) exercises ROUNDED; the 88-level PASSING gate is read on every case.
